name: build-and-analyze
description: An orchestration that demonstrates the Command step type. It runs 'dotnet build' to compile a project, uses a Command step to run 'git log' for recent changes, then uses an LLM to analyze the build output and git history together to produce a developer summary.

steps.name: analyze-results
steps.systemPrompt: You are a developer productivity assistant. You analyze build outputs and recent git history to produce concise summaries for the development team.
